title: gesneria neglecta
intro: Gesneria neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'Neglected Gesneria'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gesneria neglecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Gesneria neglecta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
